description: This Java class defines the entity CorrectiveAction within a JPA context, modeling a corrective action with fields such as defect reference, action description, status, due date, assignee, notes, and timestamps for creation and update. It includes JPA annotations for ORM mapping, indexes, and lifecycle callback to update the timestamp on modifications.

classes.name: CorrectiveAction
classes.description: Entity class representing a corrective action with fields for defect, action description, status, due date, assignee, notes, and timestamps, including JPA annotations for ORM and indexes.

methods.name: preUpdate
methods.description: Lifecycle callback method annotated with @PreUpdate, updates the 'updatedAt' timestamp before the entity is persisted with changes.
